nasb.text: Like charcoal to hot embers and wood to fire, So is a contentious man to kindle strife.

esv.text: As charcoal to hot embers and wood to fire, so is a quarrelsome man for kindling strife.

cnv.text: 好爭競的人，煽動爭端， 就像餘燼上加炭，火上加柴一樣。

ccb.text: 好斗之人煽动争端， 如同余火加炭、火上加柴。

csbs.text: 好争执的人煽动争端， 就如余火加炭，火上加柴。
